notes: IFS 1.0.18 - display screen buttons now drive EITHER 4D display (send both a Genie form-switch and an S<n> command); each panel acts on the one it understands. Fixed the display-firmware .cfg checksum reject (git autocrlf was mangling the text .cfg - now stored verbatim). Clarified the display tab for the two panels (Plasma StandAlone telemetry display vs Tip Charger V18 Genie). NOTE: the Plasma StandAlone display needs its screen-select firmware update (recompile in Workshop, flash via the Display firmware panel) to obey S<n>. Signed (Augeas Technologies).
